overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk along Night City's waterfront promenade. The camera follows various NPCs including a police officer through a futuristic urban environment with towering glass skyscrapers, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with palm trees and high-rise buildings

events.description: pedestrian in pink pants moves to the right side and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing pink pants and a black jacket along the waterfront walkway

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing bright pink pants and dark top

entered.detail: tall residential building with red facade and multiple balconies
modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows and geometric architecture
line of tall palm trees along the waterfront edge
metal and concrete safety barrier separating walkway from water
tall yellow lamp post with horizontal light fixture
large glowing screen displaying colorful advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city waterfront with the camera following a pedestrian in pink pants. Tall red brick and glass buildings line the left side while palm trees and a waterfront railing run along the right. The walkway features distinctive orange paving tiles, and digital billboards illuminate the building facades.

agents.ego_description: walking alone along the promenade past wooden benches and trash receptacles

entered.detail: simple wooden slatted bench for pedestrian seating
cylindrical waste receptacle next to the bench

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the waterfront promenade now devoid of nearby pedestrians. Wooden park benches and trash cans appear on the right side. The red brick building looms closer on the left while traffic continues to flow on the adjacent multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade passing modern office blocks

events.description: begins following a new pedestrian wearing a white jacket with yellow accents

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a white hooded jacket with neon yellow accents

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing white jacket with hood and yellow trim

entered.detail: grey concrete building with vertical window strips and industrial aesthetic
abandoned green upholstered couch sitting on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: A new pedestrian in a white jacket appears ahead and becomes the follow target. The architecture shifts to modern concrete office blocks on the left. An abandoned green sofa sits on the right sidewalk near the waterfront railing as the camera continues along the promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with parked vehicles and industrial structures

events.description: NCPD officer appears from the left and becomes the new primary follow target
civilian with red mohawk appears walking on the right side

agents.ego_description: following an NCPD police officer and a civilian with red mohawk past a line of parked cars

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer walking briskly ahead wearing tactical gear with NCPD lettering
civilian with distinctive red mohawk walking alongside the officer

entered.detail: futuristic green sport utility vehicle parked along the curb
large metal pipe structure extending over the water
hovering drone with illuminated billboard flying above the street

segments.scene_description: An NCPD officer suddenly appears and becomes the new follow target, accompanied by a civilian with a red mohawk. The scene features parked futuristic vehicles lining the left side of the walkway and large industrial ventilation pipes on the right. A floating advertisement drone hovers in the distance as the camera continues through the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic waterfront promenade that shifts from a vibrant commercial district to a more industrial urban corridor. It begins by trailing a pedestrian in pink pants past red brick and glass buildings adorned with glowing digital billboards and lined with palm trees. As the camera moves forward, the walkway clears of people and the scenery transitions toward wooden park benches and a looming brick facade beside a busy multi-lane road. The scene then shifts focus to a pedestrian in a white jacket as the architecture transforms into modern concrete office blocks and an abandoned green sofa appears along the railing. Finally, the camera turns to follow an NCPD officer and a civilian with a red mohawk, passing parked futuristic vehicles and large industrial ventilation pipes while a floating advertisement drone hovers in the distance.
